user.title: Add Raylogic H81 Panel
user.description: Enter the panel's IP address and Start Address (shown in the Raylogic GO app's Device Info screen, e.g. 0x0101). The 8 channels will be calculated automatically.

error.invalid_start_address: Could not read the start address. Use a value like 0101, 0x0101, or 257.
error.invalid_ip: Please enter a valid IP address.

abort.already_configured: This panel (IP + start address) is already configured.

init.title: Advanced settings
init.description: Only change these if your panel uses non-default values (confirm with a Docklight capture).
